DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS MERRIMAN HOLDINGS, INC., FORMERLY KNOWN AS MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD GROUP, INC., MERRIMAN CAPITAL INC., FORMERLY KNOWN AS MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO., INC., D. JONATHAN MERRIAMN, GREGORY S. CURHAN, AND ROB FORD'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED.
DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED.
DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD RESCISSION RATHER THAN ACTUAL DAMAGES.
DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF SHOULD SPECIFICALLY STATE FACTS CONSTITUTING MISREPRESENTATIONS AND NEGLIGENT ACTS.
DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED.
(Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS MERRIMAN HOLDINGS, INC., FORMERLY KNOWN AS MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD GROUP, INC., MERRIMAN CAPITAL INC., FORMERLY KNOWN AS MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO., INC., D. JONATHAN MERRIAMN, GREGORY S. CURHAN, AND ROB FORD'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. (Moving party may incorporate this ruling with companion order on demurrer.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
